LanguageData.ABY_EarlyLoreWhisperDesc:
The threshold was crossed unnoticed.
After that, some things began to behave with too much precision: silence, pauses, repetitions, heat that is slow to leave.

At first, it is easy to mistake it for chance.
For a beautiful flaw in the pattern.
For noise that has rested too long beside something forbidden.

But the old fragments warn of the same thing, each in its own words:
look into the right depth for long enough, and one day you realize the waiting was mutual.

For now, it is not a voice.
Not a sign.
Not even a name.

Only the faint pressure of something for which the known gods may not have been the summit, but merely a convenient form of approach.

It is still far away.
But that is not the strangest part.

The strangest part is that after the first warnings, almost no one stopped going further.
